mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chef_profile ( user_id, avatar, display_name, real_name, id_card_imgs, health_cert_imgs, chef_cert_imgs, cuisine_type, service_area, service_desc, price, min_people, max_people, age, gender, work_years, audit_status, phone, score, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{chefProfile.userId}, #{chefProfile.avatar}, #{chefProfile.displayName}, #{chefProfile.realName}, #{chefProfile.idCardImgs}, #{chefProfile.healthCertImgs}, #{chefProfile.chefCertImgs}, #{chefProfile.cuisineType}, #{chefProfile.serviceArea}, #{chefProfile.serviceDesc}, #{chefProfile.price}, #{chefProfile.minPeople}, #{chefProfile.maxPeople}, #{chefProfile.age}, #{chefProfile.gender}, #{chefProfile.workYears}, #{chefProfile.auditStatus}, #{chefProfile.phone}, #{chefProfile.score}, #{chefProfile.createTime}, #{chefProfile.updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE chef_profile SET user_id = #{chefProfile.userId}, avatar = #{chefProfile.avatar}, display_name = #{chefProfile.displayName}, real_name = #{chefProfile.realName}, id_card_imgs = #{chefProfile.idCardImgs}, health_cert_imgs = #{chefProfile.healthCertImgs}, chef_cert_imgs = #{chefProfile.chefCertImgs}, cuisine_type = #{chefProfile.cuisineType}, service_area = #{chefProfile.serviceArea}, service_desc = #{chefProfile.serviceDesc}, price = #{chefProfile.price}, min_people = #{chefProfile.minPeople}, max_people = #{chefProfile.maxPeople}, age = #{chefProfile.age}, gender = #{chefProfile.gender}, work_years = #{chefProfile.workYears}, audit_status = #{chefProfile.auditStatus}, phone = #{chefProfile.phone}, score = #{chefProfile.score}, update_time = #{chefProfile.updateTime} WHERE id = #{chefProfile.id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chef_profile ( user_id, avatar, display_name, real_name, id_card_imgs, health_cert_imgs, chef_cert_imgs, cuisine_type, service_area, service_desc, price, min_people, max_people, age, gender, work_years, audit_status, phone, score, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{chefProfile.userId}, #{chefProfile.avatar}, #{chefProfile.displayName}, #{chefProfile.realName}, #{chefProfile.idCardImgs}, #{chefProfile.healthCertImgs}, #{chefProfile.chefCertImgs}, #{chefProfile.cuisineType}, #{chefProfile.serviceArea}, #{chefProfile.serviceDesc}, #{chefProfile.price}, #{chefProfile.minPeople}, #{chefProfile.maxPeople}, #{chefProfile.age}, #{chefProfile.gender}, #{chefProfile.workYears}, #{chefProfile.auditStatus}, #{chefProfile.phone}, #{chefProfile.score}, #{chefProfile.createTime}, #{chefProfile.updateTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE avatar = VALUES(avatar), display_name = VALUES(display_name), real_name = VALUES(real_name), id_card_imgs = VALUES(id_card_imgs), health_cert_imgs = VALUES(health_cert_imgs), chef_cert_imgs = VALUES(chef_cert_imgs), cuisine_type = VALUES(cuisine_type), service_area = VALUES(service_area), service_desc = VALUES(service_desc), price = VALUES(price), min_people = VALUES(min_people), max_people = VALUES(max_people), age = VALUES(age), gender = VALUES(gender), work_years = VALUES(work_years), audit_status = VALUES(audit_status), phone = VALUES(phone), score = VALUES(score), update_time = VALUES(update_time)

INSERT INTO chef_profile ( user_id, avatar, display_name, real_name, id_card_imgs, health_cert_imgs, chef_cert_imgs, cuisine_type, service_area, service_desc, price, min_people, max_people, age, gender, work_years, audit_status, phone, score, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{p.userId}, #{p.avatar}, #{p.displayName}, #{p.realName}, #{p.idCardImgs}, #{p.healthCertImgs}, #{p.chefCertImgs}, #{p.cuisineType}, #{p.serviceArea}, #{p.serviceDesc}, #{p.price}, #{p.minPeople}, #{p.maxPeople}, #{p.age}, #{p.gender}, #{p.workYears}, #{p.auditStatus}, #{p.phone}, #{p.score}, #{p.createTime}, #{p.updateTime} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE avatar = VALUES(avatar), display_name = VALUES(display_name), real_name = VALUES(real_name), id_card_imgs = VALUES(id_card_imgs), health_cert_imgs = VALUES(health_cert_imgs), chef_cert_imgs = VALUES(chef_cert_imgs), cuisine_type = VALUES(cuisine_type), service_area = VALUES(service_area), service_desc = VALUES(service_desc), price = VALUES(price), min_people = VALUES(min_people), max_people = VALUES(max_people), age = VALUES(age), gender = VALUES(gender), work_years = VALUES(work_years), audit_status = VALUES(audit_status), phone = VALUES(phone), score = VALUES(score), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
